channel.title: Hourly Kabir Das Dohas
channel.description: Timeless wisdom by Sant Kabir Das

item.title: गुरु बिन ज्ञान न उपजै, गुरु बिन मिलै न मोष ।
item.description:
Meaning: Without a Guru, there is no knowledge and no salvation.

Translation: No Guru, no wisdom, no freedom.
item.guid: गुरु बिन ज्ञान न उपजै, गुरु बिन मिलै न मोष ।493831

item.title: माया मरी न मन भरा, मर-मर गया शरीर ।
item.description:
Meaning: Illusion and mind didn't die; only the body died again and again.

Translation: Illusion and mind live on; only the body dies repeatedly.
item.guid: माया मरी न मन भरा, मर-मर गया शरीर ।493832

item.title: कबीरा यहु घर प्रेम का, खाला का घर नाहिं । सीस उतारे हाथि करि, सो पैठे घर माहिं ॥
item.description:
Meaning: This is the house of love. Sacrifice ego to enter.

Translation: This is the home of love. Sacrifice your ego to enter.
item.guid: कबीरा यहु घर प्रेम का, खाला का घर नाहिं । सीस उतारे हाथि करि, सो पैठे घर माहिं ॥493833
